data.title: Powell Max Limited (Nasdaq: PMAX) regained NASDAQ compliance with audit committee requirements.
data.description: Powell Max Limited, a financial communications services provider based in Hong Kong, recently disclosed its compliance with Nasdaq’s audit committee requirements per Listing Rule 5605(c)(2). The company, traded as PMAX on Nasdaq, announced the successful restoration of compliance.

data.title: ALK to present annual report for 2025 on February 20, 2026, in the morning. Trading codes: ALKB:DC / OMX: ALK B.
data.description: On Friday, February 20, 2026, ALK (ALKB:DC / OMX: ALK B) is slated to release its annual report for 2025 in the morning.

data.title: Gravity Co., Ltd. releases unaudited 4Q 2025 results. Company is South Korean-based online/mobile game developer.
data.description: Gravity Co., Ltd., a South Korea-based online and mobile games developer, released its unaudited financial results for the quarter ending December 31, 2025. The company, listed as GRVY on NasdaqGM, reported these results in compliance with International Financial Reporting Standards. The announcement included various business updates.

data.title: MT Højgaard Holding A/S to host conference call on 20 Feb at 10:00 CET about FY 2025 results. No registration required.
data.description: MT Højgaard Holding will unveil its 2025 annual report on February 20, 2026. A conference call will be held at 10:00 (CET) on the same day, during which the management will discuss the results and future prospects, followed by a Q&A session. No registration is needed for participation.

data.title: Atmus Filtration Techs (ATMU) beat Q4 earnings by 15.79%, reporting EPS $0.66 vs $0.57 estimate. Revenue up $39.90 million.
data.description: Atmus Filtration Techs (NYSE: ATMU) recently announced its Q4 earnings on Friday, February 13, 2026 at 06:44 AM. The company exceeded estimated earnings, reporting an EPS of $0.66 compared to the estimated $0.57, representing a 15.79% beat. Revenue saw a $39.90 million increase from the previous year. In the last quarter, Atmus Filtration Techs surpassed EPS estimates by $0.09, leading to a 2.99% increase in performance. For more details, the full story can be found on Benzinga.com.

data.title: Marcus & Millichap's Q4 earnings beat estimates by 61.9%, posting an EPS of $0.34. Revenue increased by $3.87 million.
data.description: Marcus & Millichap (NYSE: MMI) unveiled its Q4 earnings report on February 13, 2026, at 06:03 AM. The report revealed key insights for investors. The company exceeded estimated earnings by a significant margin of 61.9%, reporting an EPS of $0.34 compared to the estimated $0.21. Moreover, revenue showed a notable increase of $3.87 million compared to the previous year. This strong performance adds to the company's solid track record in delivering positive earnings results. For further details, the complete story can be accessed on Benzinga.com.

data.title: Sensient Technologies Corp's Q4 revenue rises to $393.4M, up 4.5% from last year. Reported 2.0% increase in local currency basis.
data.description: In Milwaukee, Sensient Technologies Corporation (NYSE: SXT) released its financial results for the fourth quarter ending December 31, 2025. The company, known for providing flavors and colors for the food, pharmaceutical, and personal care sectors, saw a 4.5% rise in revenue, reaching $393.4 million for the quarter compared to $376.4 million from the previous year. In local currency terms, revenue rose by 2.0%.

data.title: Rithm Property Trust Inc. reports Q4 2025 highlights: GAAP income $2.5M, dividend $2.7M, and loss $(0.5)M.
data.description: Rithm Property Trust Inc. (NYSE: RPT) released its financial results for the fourth quarter and full year ending December 31, 2025. In the fourth quarter of 2025, the company reported a GAAP comprehensive income of $2.5 million, equivalent to $0.33 per diluted common share(1)(2). Earnings available for distribution were $(0.5) million or $(0.06) per diluted common share(1)(3). Additionally, a common dividend of $2.7 million at $0.36 per common share was paid out during this period.

data.title: Atmus Filtration Technologies Inc. reported Q4 net sales of $447 million and full year net sales of $1,764 million.
data.description: Atmus Filtration Technologies Inc. (Atmus; NYSE: ATMU) based in Nashville, Tennessee, a leading provider of filtration and media solutions worldwide, disclosed its financial performance for the fourth quarter and the entirety of the year concluding on December 31, 2025. Noteworthy figures include net sales reaching $447 million in the fourth quarter and $1,764 million for the entire year. Additionally, the company reported GAAP net income of $48 million for the fourth quarter and $207 million for the full year. Diluted earnings per share stood at $0.58 for the mentioned period.

data.description: Energy company TC Energy (NYSE: TRP) released its Q4 earnings report on Friday, February 13, 2026, at 06:30 AM. The company exceeded estimated earnings by 8.0%, with an EPS of $0.702 compared to the expected $0.65. Their revenue increased by $431.00 million from the previous year's Q4. In the last quarter, TC Energy had fallen short in their earnings. For more details, the full story can be found on Benzinga.com.

data.title: CEO Ross Gerber criticizes crypto hype around Trump and Melania memecoins, suggesting they spook investors and lead to money loss.
data.description: Ross Gerber, CEO of Gerber Kawasaki Wealth & Investment Management, believes that the recent decline in Bitcoin may be due to the rise of speculative meme coins like Trump (CRYPTO: TRUMP) and Melania (CRYPTO: MELANIA). These meme coins, often promoted by celebrities, lead investors to lose money while the promoters profit. Gerber warns that investors should be cautious of such tokens, as the money invested is essentially "stolen" from them and does not come back. He also mentions other celebrity-backed cryptocurrencies like those launched by Eric Adams and Haliey Welch as further examples of such risky investments. This trend is causing concern in the broader crypto market during Donald Trump's presidency.

data.title: 3 in 10 singles use LinkedIn for dating, inviting coworkers to connect. 868 U.S. singles surveyed, using it for professional and romantic outreach.
data.description: In Kirkland, Washington, on February 13, 2026, Resume.org, a top resume-building platform, unveiled fresh data from a survey of 868 American singles conducted in February 2026. The survey delved into the dual role of LinkedIn as a tool for both professional networking and romantic connections.

data.title: Bitcoin holds at $66,000 as Ethereum, XRP weaken before inflation data. Liquidations hit $251.62M in 24 hours. Bitcoin ETFs saw $410.4M outflows, Ethereum ETFs $113.1M. Memecoin sector up 3%.
data.description: Bitcoin is currently maintaining its position around the $66,000 mark amidst anticipation for key inflation data. Within the last 24 hours, liquidations have amounted to $251.62 million. Bitcoin ETFs experienced net outflows of $410.4 million, while Ethereum ETFs saw net outflows of $113.1 million. The latest cryptocurrency prices are as follows: Bitcoin at $66,890.99, Ethereum at $1,955.34, Solana at $80.00, XRP at $1.36, Dogecoin at $0.09387, and Shiba Inu at $0.00056102. The meme coin sector saw a 3% increase for the second consecutive session, which contrasts with the general market trend. Trader Ali provides detailed insights on the current crypto market scenario. More information is available on a finance news platform.
